summary: Phase 3.3 Todo Count Limit Warning: Add warning when todo count approaches limit and prevent addition when limit is exceeded

plan_steps.title: Update AppConfig with default max todo count and warning threshold
Add maxTodoCount property and warning stream to TodoProvider
Add limit check logic in addTodo method
Add todoLimitExceeded error type to error_messages.dart
Add error handling for limit exceeded in save method

risks: Existing todos may exceed new limit on first run
Warning dialog may appear frequently if threshold is too low
acceptance_criteria: Warning dialog appears when todo count reaches warning threshold (80)
Todo addition is blocked when count reaches max limit (100)
Error message is displayed clearly when limit is exceeded
evaluation_notes: Simple feature with low risk. Good user experience improvement. Default values can be adjusted in AppConfig.

agent_plan.role: Plan creation and handoff artifact generation
Todo count limit warning feature implementation
